truth_meter.name: Renewable electricity
truth_meter.note: Current renewable share is material, but the pathway to an 80% renewable electricity system by 2030 remains steep.

truth_meter.name: Thermal/other
truth_meter.note: This is the unclassified remainder after detected wind, solar and imports. It should not be read as measured gas until a true fuel-mix source is wired.

truth_meter.name: Grid carbon intensity
truth_meter.note: Carbon intensity improves when wind is high, but the system remains sensitive to gas generation.

truth_meter.name: Energy affordability
truth_meter.note: Household electricity and gas costs remain a social constraint on transition legitimacy.

truth_meter.name: EV transition
truth_meter.note: New electric vehicle uptake is improving, but fleet turnover remains slower than headline sales suggest.

truth_meter.name: Heat transition
truth_meter.note: Home heating is harder to decarbonise than electricity and needs separate public tracking.
